title: cirsium cardo-leonis
intro: Cirsium cardo-leonis, also known as the Thistle of the Lion, is a flowering plant species within the thistle family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cirsium cardo-leonis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Cirsium cardo-leonis can be found in tea, infusion, and tincture forms, often used to support overall health and well-being.
